subject: A snarling feline beast (felidar) with bared fangs and a wild mane, mid-lunge through dense jungle foliage
description: A predatory feline creature — fanged, wild-eyed, with a shaggy ruff around its neck — lunges forward through thick green undergrowth. Its mouth gapes open in mid-snarl, revealing rows of sharp teeth and a pink tongue. The beast's body is muscled and tawny, partially obscured by the lush vines, fronds and broad leaves that frame the scene. Light filters down from above through the canopy, picking out the creature's snarling face and the moist greenery around it. The composition is tight, claustrophobic — the animal is bursting out of the foliage directly at the viewer. Color palette is dominated by deep forest greens with warm tan and pink accents from the cat's hide and gaping maw.
foreground: snarling fanged feline beast lunging through leaves
background: dense jungle foliage, vines, broad green leaves
